prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连海事大学为 211、双一流高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第 113 名（2026 年），近年排名在 99–113 之间波动，整体层次稳定；该校在声誉评价文件中未出现明显正面或负面舆情，整体声誉平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第 50 位，评价为「较热」，短视频曝光量处于中等偏上水平，对报考关注度有一定正向作用；近年无投档断档记录；该校以交通运输工程（船舶与海洋工程、航海技术等）为特色，虽第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校具体评级，但作为中国著名海事院校，在航海、轮机、交通运输等领域具有行业领先地位，对相关专业考生有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类等工科专业社会热度持续较高；山西省 2026 年物理类考生 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 5928 人（-3.4%），考生总数下降对竞争有一定缓和作用，但缩招幅度（-4.6%）略大于考生降幅，综合竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026 年招生计划小幅缩招（103 人 vs 108 人）以及山西省物理类考生减少约 3.4%，缩招对竞争的影响略大于考生减少的缓和作用，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年（16578 名）略有前移（更易进）；预测最低位次约 16087 名，区间 15587–16587 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 13373→16390→14608→17400→16578, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the recent 3 years (2023–2025), it oscillated within the 14608–17400 range, with a baseline of approximately 16578 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province's Science/Physics Category was 110 in 2021, 107 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 105 in 2024, and 108 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 103 students, a reduction of 5 (-4.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian Maritime University is a 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 113th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with fluctuations between 99 and 113 in recent years, maintaining a stable overall level. The university has no significant positive or negative public opinion in reputation evaluation documents, with a generally stable reputation. On Douyin, it ranks 50th in overall school popularity, rated as 'relatively hot', with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, positively influencing application attention. There have been no recent records of enrollment gaps. The university specializes in transportation engineering (ship and ocean engineering, navigation technology, etc.). Although specific ratings from the fifth round of discipline evaluation are not included, as a renowned maritime institution in China, it holds a leading position in navigation, marine engineering, and transportation, attracting stable interest from related major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 167,419 Physics Category examinees, a decrease of approximately 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025. The decline in total examinees somewhat eases competition, but the enrollment reduction (-4.6%) is slightly larger than the examinee decrease, leading to a slight overall intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (103 vs. 108), and the approximately 3.4% decrease in Shanxi Physics Category examinees, the impact of enrollment reduction on competition slightly outweighs the easing effect of fewer examinees. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be slightly higher (easier to enter) than in 2025 (16578). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16087, with a range of 15587–16587.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 15587–16587, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Internet of Things Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Transportation) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation) as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors (Environmental Science and Engineering, Safety Engineering, Business Administration) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15587), you can prioritize Tier 1 popular engineering majors.
